title: Tier-tagged collections plus System.FS and Path packages

source.subject: feat(corelib): tier-tag collections + System.{FS,Path} and add tier coverage suites

body:
## What shipped

Introduces tier-tagged collection types plus **System.FS** and **System.Path** packages with tier coverage suites in corelib.

## Platform specification

- **Corelib API shape** — `/platform-spec/core-library/stability-and-api-shape/corelib-api-shape` — *implements* (required)

## Source commit

Repository **`corelib`** · commit `d706067`

> feat(corelib): tier-tag collections + System.{FS,Path} and add tier coverage suites

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
